extension.summary: Watch live streams, VODs and clips from kick.com
extension.description: Browse live channels by language and category, channel pages with VODs and clips, search, and HLS playback via InputStream Adaptive. Uses a Cloudflare Worker proxy to bypass Kick WAF.
extension.disclaimer: This addon is not affiliated with kick.com.
extension.license: GNU GENERAL PUBLIC LICENSE Version 2, June 1991
extension.news: v2.5.0 - cleanup: remove fanart, fix log prefix, update metadata and locales
